name: chr3_centromere_alpha_satellite
description: Chromosome 3 alpha-satellite array (D3Z1). Higher-order repeat monomer of 171 bp; size in the population ranges from ~1 to ~6 Mb. The chr3 alpha-satellite higher-order repeat shows extensive sequence heterogeneity between haplotypes.

architecture.internal_structure: Alpha-satellite HOR array D3Z1; flanking pericentric SDs at 3p11.1 and 3q11.1; haplotype-specific HOR variants known.
